spec.title: Memoria — Todas las VMs Linux (usada vs total)

spec.expr: node_filesystem_size_bytes{job="node_exporters", instance!="10.60.60.1:9100", mountpoint="/", fstype!="tmpfs"} - node_filesystem_free_bytes{job="node_exporters", instance!="10.60.60.1:9100", mountpoint="/", fstype!="tmpfs"}

1 - (node_filesystem_free_bytes{job="node_exporters", instance!="10.60.60.1:9100", mountpoint="/", fstype!="tmpfs"} / node_filesystem_size_bytes{job="node_exporters", instance!="10.60.60.1:9100", mountpoint="/", fstype!="tmpfs"})
